title: Disjoint Sets, Connectivity, and Offline Grouping · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A data platform needs ordered queries and changing connectivity with bounded long-run cost. Combine balanced indexing and disjoint-set operations with formal and measured amortized evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Predictable Dynamic Index with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use induction on input size or recursive structure to prove algorithm properties.
State initialization, maintenance, and termination for nontrivial loop invariants.
Use contradiction and exchange arguments where direct construction is awkward.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
